name: Ayam Panggang Mesanten (Grilled Chicken With
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and shred the chilies.
2. Crush lemon grass with the side of a cleaver.
3. Cut chicken in half and wash/dry it.
4. Rub chicken with salt and oil.
5. Grill over hot coals for 10-15 minutes each side until done.
6. Slice chicken into bite-sized pieces.
7. Wrap shrimp paste in foil and toast each side over moderate heat for about 2 minutes.
8. Pound shallots, garlic, chilies, and toasted shrimp paste into a paste.
9. Heat oil in a frying pan.
10. Add paste and fry on moderate heat, stirring, for about 4-5 minutes until dry, do not burn.
11. Gradually add coconut milk, stirring after each addition.
12. Add bay leaves and lemon grass; bring to a boil.
13. Simmer for 5 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
14. Add lime juice; stir.
15. Add cooked chicken and reheat in the sauce.
16. Garnish with shredded chili.
17. Serve with rice and Sambal Ulek.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
